title: Fix Maximum Subarray

buggyCode.python:
def maxSubArray(nums):
    s = 0
    m = 0
    for n in nums:
        s += n
        m = max(m, s)
    return m

crewmateObjective: Your Objective: Find maximum subarray sum.

crewmateObjective: Your Objective: Check if array contains duplicates.

title: Fix Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: Find maximum profit from stock prices.

expectedFix.python:
def maxProfit(p):
    minp = float('inf')
    profit = 0
    for price in p:
        minp = min(minp, price)
        profit = max(profit, price - minp)
    return profit

crewmateObjective: Your Objective: Find maximum profit from stock prices.

title: Fix Valid Anagram
description: Check if two strings are anagrams.

buggyCode.python:
def isAnagram(s, t):
    return set(s) == set(t)

expectedFix.python:
def isAnagram(s, t):
    return sorted(s) == sorted(t)

crewmateObjective: Your Objective: Check if two strings are anagrams.

title: Fix Binary Search

expectedFix.python:
def search(nums, target):
    l, r = 0, len(nums) - 1
    while l <= r:
        m = (l + r) // 2
        if nums[m] == target: return m
        elif nums[m] < target: l = m + 1
        else: r = m - 1
    return -1

crewmateObjective: Your Objective: Search target in sorted array.
